title: Arachnis longicaulis
taxonomy: Arachnis longicaulis is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This genus is part of the subfamily Vandoideae and tribe Aeridinae. Arachnis longicaulis is native to tropical Asia and is known for its showy flowers and climbing habits. The classification of Arachnis longicaulis is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its long flowering stems and waxy leaves. It is often grown as an ornamental plant in tropical regions due to its attractive appearance.
